titleStmt.title: SII 5.649: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 649. (A.R. No. 89 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE UTSAVAVIGRAHA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu vṛścika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu ṣaṣṭi yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai
rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyār koyil Āriyakkaṇkāṇi cāṇḍi�ya ṉ Etiroppilātāṉāṉa cuntarapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇākauṭaiya Iva
ṉ brātā perumāḷpiḷḷaiyāna Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ poṉṉār meṉipaṭṭaṉum Iccuntarappaṭṭaṉaiye mutukaṇṇākauṭaiya Ippoṉṉārmeṉipaṭṭaṉ mātā Umaiyāṇṭāḷum Ivvaṉaivo
m Uṭaiyār tirumaḻapāṭiuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tirumañcaṉampuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ kuṭutta kamukantoṭṭamāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam Eṭuttapātanallūril tiruveḷḷaṟaivatikku kiḻakku ko
ntakkaṉmātevi vāykkālukku vaṭakku 5- kū 2- catirattu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa paḷḷameṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa Ūṟpaṭi nilam� Innilam Iraimāvum tirumañcaṉappuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa
maiyil Itukku tirumañcaṉam Eṭukkum tirumenikku jivaṉattukku veṇṭuvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi viḷainilattile viṭṭu Ikkamukan toṭṭam tirunāmattukkāṇiyā
ka kalveṭṭikaThe syllables kuṭuttom have not been incised.
Digital edition of SII 5.649 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
